programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Indian factories allow access to see the manufacturing of the classic Indian summer-quencher jaljeera and the traditional Lucknawi art of Chikankari.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Indian factories showcase the making of the traditional sweet soan papdi, a powerful, macho motorcycle, a washing machine and the Gujarati craft of Patan Patola sarees.

programme.title: E4 - Silambam
programme.desc: Silambam is one of the oldest martial arts in the world, mainly based on weapons, with the stick being the most widely used.

programme.title: E1 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Video journalist Arsal Bahtiar accepts the challenge of riding a scooter on an arduous journey to the top of Mount Bromo, an active volcano in East Java.

programme.title: E6 - Ohitaki Autumn Fire Festival In Saga, Japan
programme.desc: A one-hour travel show that takes Miss Universe 2015 Ms Pia Wurtzbach to interesting local and foreign destinations.

programme.title: E4 - Silambam
programme.desc: Silambam is one of the oldest martial arts in the world, mainly based on weapons, with the stick being the most widely used.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E6 - African Myths
programme.desc: Africa is a continent filled with unique and extraordinary creatures whose lives are shaped by millions of years of evolution. Africa is also the birthplace of humankind. We traveled alongside the continent's animals on our own journey of evolution, yet intelligence took us on a very different path. Our curiosity led to questions about the world around us which were answered through stories, myths and legends.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

We traveled alongside the continent's animals on our own journey of evolution, yet intelligence took us on a very different path. Our curiosity led to questions about the world around us which were answered through stories, myths and legends.

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years’ worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E4 - Dry Season
programme.desc: The dry season is the toughest time of year. With lower water levels and less space, animals need to quickly learn new skills to survive…and if they don’t, predatory vultures will swoop in for a feast.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E7 - Chilema and Her Brother
programme.desc: Chilema is an Elephant with half a trunk; losing the tip to a poacher's snare. It was intended to catch antelope for bushmeat. But the snare's indiscriminate nature means other animals often fall foul of them, with devastating results. Chilema is now having to adapt to life without an elephants most important appendage. She must learn how to eat, drink and also take a mud bath to ensure her survival. With the added challenge of the harsh dry season, Chilema is fighting against the odds to survive.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - Allies and Adversaries
programme.desc: Feel the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth’s oddest creatures. Dive deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E6 - African Myths
programme.desc: Africa is a continent filled with unique and extraordinary creatures whose lives are shaped by millions of years of evolution. Africa is also the birthplace of humankind. We traveled alongside the continent's animals on our own journey of evolution, yet intelligence took us on a very different path. Our curiosity led to questions about the world around us which were answered through stories, myths and legends.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Imagination Adventure!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his animal friends on a big imagination adventure! First, Wally teaches everyone how to sail like real pirates, but they'll need to work together to stay on course! Then, when Mimi gets hungry, she decides the moon must be made of cheese, so the friends build a rocketship to fly there & find out! The adventure continues as they follow a treasure map to find special shape keys & help Little Red Riding JJ avoid Wally Wolf's silly traps in the woods.

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E4 - Let's Play & Learn Outside with JJ!
programme.desc: It's time to play & learn outside with JJ! First, JJ & Cody spend the day taking care of their pets Bingo, Pickles & Jellybean. Then, it's time for a trip to Grandpa's farm to learn about all the animals & the sounds they make! The outdoor fun continues at the park, where JJ discovers tadpoles & learns he'll grow big one day too. The day ends with an exciting soccer match where the kids challenge their parents to a game!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E1 - Learning Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: Tori Boggs: Jump Rope Champion
programme.desc: Tori Boggs holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frog double under skips in thirty seconds. The legendary jump roper shows how her record-breaking skipping skills helped her become the best in the world.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: Painting at the Bernoulli
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an airbrush out of straws. Thanks to the Bernoulli principle, he uses it to create his own work of art.

programme.title: What's Up with Water?
programme.desc: Eric does a magic trick that defies the laws of gravity. Then he learns how to make water flow upwards using a science experiment involving flowers and capillary action.

programme.title: A Chicken Killer
programme.desc: Chip, the dog, is struggling to walk - can a new hip ease his pain? The Junior Vets give some flamingos a foot rub and check on a baby emu. Also, Johnny and Inel learn about the birds and the bees and investigate whether Jasper, the cat, really is a chicken killer.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: When Darwin brings home a mirror, Kea sees her reflection and falls in love with her new friend.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Spinning Seeds
programme.desc: Eric learns that plants have different ways to make their seeds fly as far away as possible. He makes his own version of the maple seed, which looks like a little paper helicopter.

programme.title: Recipe for Success
programme.desc: Ella and Lauren forget about finding dance partners as they head to an ice show in Brighton to brush shoulders with the stars and see if there's another way for them to follow a skating career. And our Ice Stars meet head to head in a baking challenge.

programme.title: Trip to Argentina
programme.desc: Milo, upset by his team's loss, decides to switch teams. Alim insists loyalty is for life and takes them to Argentina. They meet Sabrina, a San Lorenzo fan. After nearly causing a riot by using a wrong color, they learn that in Argentina, team loyalty is forever.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Sprinter receives a present from a secret admirer. The gift is a statue, but it's not a pretty sight. He doubts that maybe it is from a supervillain! Then he starts to make deformed statues, of the villains, as revenge.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy fall out over some fireworks Robbie has bought. With Robbie covered in white powder from an accidental explosion, and Flippy pretending he doesn't exist, Albert is convinced Robbie is a ghost that only he can see.

programme.title: Flippy's shoes
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy get into some serious rivalry over who's better at basketball and organise a showdown. Flippy's new trainers turn out to have powers that give him the edge; he looks certain to win, until it all goes wrong.

programme.title: Orange Power
programme.desc: When the battery on Darwin's torch runs out just as he needs it most, he uses the power of oranges to get it working again.

programme.title: Goodbye Dear Eel Friends
programme.desc: When Wapiti's eel friends get trapped on their journey downstream, the kids use hydropower to help them on their way.

programme.title: Heart of a Lion
programme.desc: It's the English Championships. James feels nervous as he will be one of the youngest boys in his category. But as the competition gets underway, James starts to feel unwell. Amelie and Phoebe take to the floor, full of excitement.

programme.title: Daisy and The Hippos
programme.desc: Daisy, the donkey, has a painful eye that needs sorting out. The Junior Vets give hungry hippos Ernie and Godzilla a dental check and find out if George the giraffe has any unwelcome guests.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E15 - From The Riviera To Snowy Peaks!
programme.desc: Heading to the Swiss Valais where the Vingt-Deux, a tiny restaurant, is enjoying huge success. The incredible adventure of the animated film ''Flow,'' largely created in Belgium. The Buissonniere store celebrates its 40th anniversary! And the Gilles of La Louviere at the prestigious Nice carnival.

programme.title: E10 - Acid Ocean
programme.desc: In 2025, humanity officially crossed a seventh planetary boundary: ocean acidification. A critical threshold with irreversible consequences for marine ecosystems. At the tip of Finistere, Fabrice Pernet must rethink his work as a researcher. He studies shellfish, sentinels of this disruption.

programme.title: E69 - T3, Provencale Architecture
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E6 - A Different Way Of Raising Farm Animals
programme.desc: The way we treat and feed animals is increasingly being taken into account in buying decisions. Many producers are consequently doing everything possible to provide the best living conditions to their livestock.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Chef Pierre Richard de Moncton shares his recipe for mackerel with seasonal vegetables and caviar from local sturgeon.

programme.title: E47 - Modern Shoemaking
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E5 - Ken Belanger, Mountain Guide In Japan
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: E24 - In Caen (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Caen, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she focuses on the castles nearby and the famous Norman dessert, teurgoule.

programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: E102 - Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find 'the big picture' as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: E268 - A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: E115 - Cover Girls / Save the Date
programme.desc: When all 10 of Lincoln’s sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby’s little sister, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: E326 - SpongeBob TrashPants / Krusty Kafeteria
programme.desc: SpongeBob cleans up all the garbage in town... except for one stubborn ball of trash. // SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs attempt to serve Krabby Patties at Pearl's school without being caught by the strict lunch lady.

programme.title: E403 - Roll Model with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero.

programme.title: E423 - Wheel and Deal / Feast or Family
programme.desc: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby. // When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

programme.title: E718 - Let's Break A Deal
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him.

programme.title: E110 - Donnie Goes Deep
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: E309 - Don't Go In There
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon a door they have never seen before in the Man's Nest and are determined to see what's behind it despite Ray telling them it's off limits. However, once they get inside, they must deal with the dangerous and bizarre consequences.

programme.title: E117 - Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte, and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: E113 - For Bros About to Rock / It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House

programme.desc: Patrick devolves back into a baby so he can keep his childhood toys.

Magandang Buhay[Live]
programme.desc: MAGANDANG BUHAY is a talkshow hosted by Karla Estrada, Jolina Magdangal, and Melai Cantiveros.

programme.title: God's Influencer: Saint Carlo Acutis
programme.desc: Presented by ABS-CBN Current Affairs, 'God's Influencer' shares the extraordinary life and digital evangelism of Carlo Acutis, the world's first millennial saint, through the eyes of the Filipinos who are actively championing his devotion. From priests, youth, and even children, they recount powerful personal stories-including visits to his tomb and attending the canonization rites-detailing how this young religious teenager, the “Patron Saint of the Internet”, inspired and made a mark in their lives.

programme.title: Bini Chapter 1: Born To Win[Live]
programme.desc: A feature documentary chronicling the rise of BINI, the Filipino P‑pop girl group, tracing their origins, intensive pre‑debut training, early challenges-including the ABS‑CBN shutdown and pandemic years-and their growing success leading up to their first solo concert, Biniverse. The film features behind‑the‑scenes footage, personal stories, and the group's milestone achievements in 2024, highlighting themes of resilience, sisterhood, and artistic growth.

programme.title: Juan Big Bite Ep 2
programme.desc: From mouthwatering recipes to restaurant reviews and glimpses of my everyday life, my goal is to serve up content that excites your taste buds. Let's celebrate the joy of good food together - Juan Big Bite at a time!

programme.title: Tao Po Ep 1[Live]
programme.desc: 'Tao Po' is a compelling Current Affairs program that uncovers the lives of the 'real people' behind the headlines, offering intimate interviews and insightful glimpses into their personal journeys and the issues they represent.

programme.title: My Puhunan: Kaya Mo! Ep 1
programme.desc: a magazine program that will be the primary source of information, inspiration, and motivation for Filipinos to change their mindset and be the best version of themselves in order to achieve success in life.

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E226 - The Crew Builds A Solar-Powered Bus / The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: E825 - Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Molly Mole and Freddy Fox dig a huge tunnel and find a box of pirate treasure. The treasure has gone missing - something mysterious is going on!

programme.title: E819 - Pizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: E301 - Ratoncito Perez / The Berry Hungry Caterpillar
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.title: Let’s Go Karaoke!
programme.desc: Yakuza member Narita is consumed by only one thing: how to survive his boss' annual karaoke competition. Desperate to avoid his boss' cruel and unusual punishment for losing, Narita recruits junior high school choir member Oka to teach him how to sing. The trouble is, Narita is impossibly hopeless as a singer. The stakes may be low, but Yamashita Nobuhiro's deadpan approach to an unlikely friendship and Ayano Go's hilariously self-deprecating performance make this a winning comedy that will inspire you to hit the karaoke box. Rarely has the butchering beloved pop classics ever been funnier.

programme.title: The Vanished Murderer
programme.desc: A women's prison in the Northern China in 1932, Prisoner FU Yuan (JIANG Yiyan) digs a tunnel in her prison cell with a silver spoon and escapes. Inspector SONG Donglu (LAU Ching-wan) is summoned to investigate FU's escape. By tracking down the letters sent to him by FU, it sets SONG off to Hong City to unravel FU's disappearance.

programme.title: Soul Snatcher
programme.desc: To achieve immortality, fox spirit Bai Shisan disguises as a young man and travels to the human world in search of a divine pill. There he befriends the innocent scholar Wang Zijin shom he later realizes is the key to his transcendence. To keep Wang safe, Bai must bond with him on his road to the imperial examination and fends off threats from mythic creatures and evil spirits.

programme.title: E4 - Invisible Hideaways
programme.desc: In Uruguay we venture deep within the rural countryside to an area of remote forests and lakes to a one hundred hectare resort of mirrored cabins. In Sweden we visit the Kolarbyn Eco Lodge - a rustic retreat of 12 hobbit like huts that are replicas of those built in this forest by people making charcoal from as far back as the 1800s.

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: A Better Tomorrow II
programme.desc: Former criminal, Tse-Ho is set free from his incarceration in jail to assist in the investigation of his former crime boss, Lung, who is suspected of running a counterfeit operation. Though initially refusing, he only agrees so he can keep a close eye on his cop brother Kit, who is working undercover to infiltrate Lung's organization. After Lung is framed for the murder of a rival gang leader, he turns to Tse-Ho, who helps him escape to New York where he is joined by Ken, the equally deadly twin brother of the deceased Mark. Returning to Hong Kong to rejoin Tse-Ho and Kit, they soon discover the true mastermind behind the entire operation, and in true John Woo fashion, set out to take him down.
